pages.text: Elec discipline of Engineer. Crafts the Create Additions FE power economy — electric motor (the Aero interlock anchor), alternator, connectors (small, large, light), redstone relay, digital adapter, barbed wire, capacitor, accumulator.$(br2)Top-tier storage (Modular Accumulator, Tesla Coil, Portable Energy Interface) requires a Mechanical Engineer press.$(br2)Electrum ingots, sheets, and rods stay open as base alloy. Spools and wires are class-gated.
